articles.title: Injury rules Hardik Pandya out of England series; Kohli awaits test
articles.description: Star all-rounder Hardik Pandya has been ruled out of the upcoming England series due to a leg strain. Star batter Virat Kohli also remains sidelined with an injury and is scheduled to undergo a fitness test ahead of the series.

articles.title: ISSF Jr World C'ship: India adds 5 medals; Sameer, Rohit win gold
articles.description: Indian shooters added five medals on day two of the ISSF Junior World Championship 2026. Sameer (25m Rapid Fire Pistol) and Rohit Kanyan (50m Rifle 3 Positions) clinched gold, while Prachi Gaikwad won a silver, taking India's tally to 8.

articles.title: Why Ravichandran Ashwin missed San Francisco Unicorns' MLC 2026 opener?
articles.description: Veteran Indian spinner Ravichandran Ashwin missed the San Francisco Unicorns' MLC 2026 opener due to ongoing recovery from a knee injury. The setback had previously forced him to withdraw from the Big Bash League. Ashwin, who last played in July 2025, is focusing on regaining full fitness before returning to competitive cricket later in the tournament.

articles.title: DPE makes sports a 'Common CSR Theme' to boost funding from CPSEs
articles.description: Sports development is set to get a major boost from Central Public Sector Enterprises (CPSEs) after the Department of Public Enterprises (DPE) formally notified it as a Common Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) Theme for FY 2026-27 and 2027-28.

articles.title: UFC: “Want people to see the skill level I have,” says Ion Cutelaba ahead of Stirling showdown
articles.description: For years, Cutelaba was known primarily as a wild, chaotic brawler capable of blinding violence. However, ahead of UFC Vegas, he revealed a massive shift in his approach to professional mixed martial arts.

articles.title: Why is KL Rahul not playing? Shubman Gill makes three changes for third ODI vs Afghanistan
articles.description: India has made three changes for the final ODI against Afghanistan, with KL Rahul notably absent from the playing XI. Despite already securing the series 2-0, the team aims for a clean sweep. Captain Shubman Gill indicated the side will focus on improving their big-chasing abilities. Afghanistan, opting to bat first, also introduced several new faces to their lineup.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Ismael Saibari’s rapid strike helps Morocco beat Scotland 1-0
articles.description: Morocco are in second place on the Group C Points Table with their 1-0 win over Scotland in the FIFA World Cup 2026 match on Friday.

articles.title: Australia v Netherlands: Women’s T20 World Cup 2026 – live
articles.description: Updates from the match at the Rose Bowl Start time in Southampton is 10.30am local/7.30pm AEST Any thoughts? Send Megan an email Don’t forget that you can let me know your thoughts during the game by sending me an email . I’d love to hear from you, whether it’s about this game, another recent game or some tournament predictions! Hello and welcome to another match of definitely my favourite World Cup going on right now. Today we have Australia taking on a very unfamiliar foe in the Netherlands, who are playing in their debut T20 World Cup. In fact, the two teams have never met in the T20 format before. They have played five matches in the ODI format, of which the last one was in 2000, three years before Australia’s opening batter Georgia Voll was born. Continue reading...

articles.description: Kelly Goodnow made history as the youngest gold medalist in PPA Tour history at the Boise PPA Challenger, winning the women's doubles title at just 14 years and three months old.

articles.title: Sanya E-Prix: Jake Dennis takes pole, Felipe Drugovich completes Andretti front-row lockout
articles.description: Andretti driver Jake Dennis took pole position in the Sanya E-Prix qualifying on Saturday. His teammate Felipe Drugovich joined him on the front row for the first time, giving Andretti a front-row lockout. However, it is set to be a fierce battle in Sanya, with Jaguar TCS Racing's Mitch Evans qualifying third, followed by Dan Ticktum in fourth.

articles.description: Paraguay's Miguel Almirón has made FIFA World Cup history, but for all the wrong reasons. He got a red card for covering his mouth while talking during the match against Turkey. This is the first time ever a player has been sent off for this.

articles.title: Who is Ryan Lochte’s fiancée Molly Gillihan? Meet the woman set to marry the 12-time Olympic medalist
articles.description: Ryan Lochte has announced his engagement to Molly Gillihan after approximately one year of dating. The proposal took place at Prime and Pearl in Gainesville, Florida, the same restaurant where the couple shared their first date. Gillihan, a kindergarten teacher and mother of three, recently joined Lochte in creating a blended family of six children as the Olympic swimmer begins a coaching career in Missouri.

Amid all the mess, the Cincinnati Bengals and the Dallas Cowboys have emerged as potential landing spots for him.

articles.title: Women’s T20 World Cup: Suzie Bates’ all-round heroics save New Zealand in a thriller against Ireland
articles.description: New Zealand, the reigning champions, narrowly dodged an early World Cup exit, edging out Ireland with a tense four-run victory. Suzie Bates, a seasoned player, became the surprise heroine of the match, delivering crucial runs and supporting Melie Kerr's decisive final-over bowling. Ireland aimed for their first-ever World Cup win but faltered during the final stages, despite a stellar partnership from Gaby Lewis and Orla Prendergast.

articles.title: Why Is USA Star Christian Pulisic Not Playing Against Australia? Coach Mauricio Pochettino Reveals Concern
articles.description: United States star Christian Pulisic missed the FIFA World Cup 2026 match against Australia because of a calf injury and was replaced in the starting lineup by Ricardo Pepi.

articles.title: Why Christian Pulisic is not playing USA's World Cup match vs Australia?
articles.description: U.S. star Christian Pulisic will miss Friday's World Cup match against Australia because of a calf injury and was replaced in the starting lineup by Ricardo Pepi. United States coach Mauricio Pochettino made the announcement during an interview with Fox about 90 minutes before the kickoff at Lumen Field in Seattle. On Thursday, Pochettino said Pulisic is in a "much better" spot than he was last Friday, and that he would be available for the Americans' next game against Turkey if he could not play against Australia. "Today, he was training in the morning in the camp and I've seen the feelings are good," Pochettino told Fox on Friday. "I hope as soon as possible he can be ready to be selected again and to be part of the team. Now, we need to be focused on our team and the players that are going to play." The move is a setback for a U.S. team that defeated Paraguay 4-1 in its opener on June 12 and with a win would clinch advancement to the round of 32. Pulisic left the game at halftim

articles.title: Ruben Dias rallies around Ronaldo: 'He knows this environment better than anyone'
articles.description: In a frustrating 1-1 tie against DR Congo, Portugal's captain Cristiano Ronaldo has faced intensified criticism due to his ongoing scoring struggles in significant tournaments. While Messi shines, the team stands firmly behind Ronaldo, with defender Rúben Dias and coach Roberto Martinez advocating for unity and trust in his experience. The squad, undeterred by scrutiny, is focused on the impending showdown with Uzbekistan.
